use_cases: Toggle between light and dark themes with smooth spring animations
Switch to system-preferred color scheme automatically
Accessible theme selection with keyboard navigation and ARIA labels
ai_summary: A minimalist theme switcher component featuring light, dark, and system theme options in a compact pill-shaped container. Uses motion/react for smooth layout animations when switching themes, with a spring-bounced active indicator effect. Includes full accessibility support with ARIA radio group semantics and keyboard navigation.
